prompts.prompt: I need a confirmation dialog that asks "Are you sure you want to delete this item?" with cancel and delete buttons. The delete button should be destructive-styled.
Create a multi-step form wizard with back/next buttons and a progress indicator
Something like Stripe's pricing table but with monthly/annual toggle
Create a notification preferences panel with toggle switches for Email notifications, Push notifications, and SMS alerts. Each switch should show its current state.
Build an email inbox view with a table showing sender, subject, date, and a preview snippet. Add row selection with checkboxes and a bulk actions bar that appears when items are selected.
Navigation that collapses to hamburger on mobile
A form that validates email and posts to /api/subscribe
Create a new page for a settings dashboard. It should have a header with the app title, a sidebar for navigation, and a main content area. Use the Astryx theme system.
Create a profile card with the user's name as a heading, their role as a label, their bio as body text, and their join date in small supporting text
I want to create a custom brand theme for my app. The primary accent color should be purple (#7B61FF), with a dark surface (#1A1A2E) and light text. Set up a proper Astryx theme with these colors.
